famous_sentences.text: 举头望明月，低头思故乡。
famous_sentences.author: 李白

famous_sentences.text: 但愿人长久，千里共婵娟。
famous_sentences.author: 苏轼

famous_sentences.text: 问君能有几多愁？恰似一江春水向东流。
famous_sentences.author: 李煜

famous_sentences.text: 落霞与孤鹜齐飞，秋水共长天一色。
famous_sentences.author: 王勃

famous_sentences.text: 人生自古谁无死，留取丹心照汗青。
famous_sentences.author: 文天祥

famous_sentences.text: 床前明月光，疑是地上霜。
famous_sentences.author: 李白

famous_sentences.text: 众里寻他千百度，蓦然回首，那人却在灯火阑珊处。
famous_sentences.author: 辛弃疾

famous_sentences.text: 枯藤老树昏鸦，小桥流水人家。
famous_sentences.author: 马致远

famous_sentences.text: 轻轻的我走了，正如我轻轻的来。
famous_sentences.author: 徐志摩
